t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: The AML screening provider this registration is for: 1=Chainalysis, 4=ChainalysisCDN. See [AML Provider](../../_glossary.md#aml-provider). FK to Dictionary.AmlProviders.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: The AML screening provider this registration is for: 1=Chainalysis, 2=BlackList, 3=Unsupported, 4=ChainalysisCDN. FK to Dictionary.AmlProviders.
t1_fidelity_table.loss: Added 2=BlackList, 3=Unsupported from live data (enrichment, not loss); dropped production-context glossary link

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Global Customer ID. The eToro customer this AML provider registration belongs to. Part of unique constraint with AmlProviderId.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Global Customer ID. The eToro customer this AML provider registration belongs to. Part of unique constraint with AmlProviderId.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: The customer's user identifier on the AML provider's system. Base64-encoded representation of the Gcid (e.g., Gcid 46870594 -> "NDY4NzA1OTQ="). Used in all API calls to the provider.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: The customer's user identifier on the AML provider's system. Base64-encoded representation of the Gcid (e.g., Gcid 46870594 -> "NDY4NzA1OTQ="). Used in all API calls to the provider.

t1_fidelity_table.upstream_quote: Timestamp when this customer was first registered with the AML provider.
t1_fidelity_table.wiki_quote: Timestamp when this customer was first registered with the AML provider.

issues.problem: Description adds 2=BlackList, 3=Unsupported values not present in upstream wiki (enrichment from live data). Upstream only lists 1=Chainalysis, 4=ChainalysisCDN. Strict verbatim fidelity requires quoting upstream as-is.

Harness bundle declared no upstream wiki resolvable, but Wallet.AmlProviderUsers wiki exists at knowledge/ProdSchemas/CryptoDBs/WalletDB/Wiki/Wallet/Tables/. Writer found it independently. Harness routing gap for EXW_Wallet → CryptoDBs/WalletDB path.
No explicit Phase Gate Checklist section itemizing completed vs skipped phases. Footer says 'Phases: 13/14' but individual phase status is not shown.
Type narrowing risk (production bigint vs Synapse int) mentioned in gotchas but no specific threshold check (current max Gcid vs int max 2,147,483,647) included in the wiki.
Append strategy with no uniqueness constraint could introduce duplicates. Mentioned in Section 3.4 gotchas but not in the ETL logic section where analysts look for data quality rules.

verdict.regeneration_feedback: No regeneration required. Minor polish: (1) Quote AmlProviderId verbatim from upstream, add extra provider values as a data-observation note. (2) Add explicit Phase Gate Checklist section.
